kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),'เข้าสู่ระบบ') or contains(text(),'Login')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//*[contains(text(),'เข้าสู่ระบบ') or contains(text(),'Login')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),'เข้าสู่ระบบ') or contains(text(),'Login')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` disappears from the current page.

kw.arg: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Login did not succeed — password field still visible (may be blacklisted)
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'test015' into text field 'xpath=//input[contains(@placeholder,'ค้นหา') or contains(@placeholder,'Search')]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: arguments[0].click(); By using argument: '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="6db663fa0bbef5dd642dea654f95f24c", element="f.A8AACCC6C670F5CEC45DB05C5526D890.d.317DB32782962A35FDDCBC9E22970105.e.113")>'

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'BLACKLIST') or contains(.,'Blacklist') or contains(.,'ลงโทษ')]

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=(//select)[1]' by value ก่อกวน / ทำลายทรัพย์สินในรถ.
kw.arg: ก่อกวน / ทำลายทรัพย์สินในรถ
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.msg: Typing text 'ทดสอบระบบ blacklist โดย admin' into text field 'xpath=//textarea'.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//input[@type="password"]' did not disappear in 5 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` disappears from the current page.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//input[@type="password"]' did not disappear in 5 seconds.

kw.arg: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Login did not succeed — password field still visible (may be blacklisted)
kw.arg: Login did not succeed — password field still visible (may be blacklisted)
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[contains(text(),'blacklist') or contains(text(),'blocked') or contains(text(),'suspended') or contains(text(),'ถูกระงับ') or contains(text(),'ไม่สามารถเข้าใช้งานได้')]' did not appear in 8 seconds.
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),'blacklist') or contains(text(),'blocked') or contains(text(),'suspended') or contains(text(),'ถูกระงับ') or contains(text(),'ไม่สามารถเข้าใช้งานได้')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//*[contains(text(),'blacklist') or contains(text(),'blocked') or contains(text(),'suspended') or contains(text(),'ถูกระงับ') or contains(text(),'ไม่สามารถเข้าใช้งานได้')]' did not appear in 8 seconds.

kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),'blacklist') or contains(text(),'blocked') or contains(text(),'suspended') or contains(text(),'ถูกระงับ') or contains(text(),'ไม่สามารถเข้าใช้งานได้')]
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=Expected user to be blocked but login succeeded
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Blacklisted user was correctly blocked — Test Passed!
kw.arg: Blacklisted user was correctly blocked — Test Passed!
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: ระบบไม่ได้บล็อกการสมัครใหม่ด้วยข้อมูลที่ถูก blacklist
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[contains(text(),'blacklist') or contains(text(),'ถูกระงับ') or contains(text(),'blocked') or contains(text(),'เบอร์') or contains(text(),'โทรศัพท์') or contains(text(),'already')]' did not appear in 5 seconds.
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),'blacklist') or contains(text(),'ถูกระงับ') or contains(text(),'blocked') or contains(text(),'เบอร์') or contains(text(),'โทรศัพท์') or contains(text(),'already')]

kw.status: Element 'xpath=//*[contains(text(),'blacklist') or contains(text(),'ถูกระงับ') or contains(text(),'blocked') or contains(text(),'เบอร์') or contains(text(),'โทรศัพท์') or contains(text(),'already')]' did not appear in 5 seconds.

kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),'blacklist') or contains(text(),'ถูกระงับ') or contains(text(),'blocked') or contains(text(),'เบอร์') or contains(text(),'โทรศัพท์') or contains(text(),'already')]
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=User สามารถ login ได้หลังจากกด ระงับถาวร — แสดงว่าระบบมีปัญหา
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: TC6 Passed — user ยังถูก blacklist อยู่หลังกดระงับถาวร
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: ทดสอบว่า admin กดระงับถาวรแล้ว user ยังถูก blacklist อยู่ ปลดไม่ได้
test.status: Element 'xpath=//tr[contains(.,'test012') or contains(.,'test012@gmail.com')]//button[contains(.,'ระงับถาวร') or contains(.,'Permanent') or contains(.,'permanent')]' not visible after 10 seconds.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
